billing_downgrade_free_confirm_descripti: Your paid subscription will end immediately and this store will move to the Free plan. Unused time on your current monthly period is not refunded. Paid-only features will no longer apply.

Your paid subscription will end immediately and this store will move to the Free plan. Unused time on your current yearly period is refunded to your original payment method (proportional to remaining time). Paid-only features will no longer apply.
billing_downgrade_free_confirm_title: Move this store to the Free plan?
billing_downgrade_monthly_confirm_descri: Your plan tier stays the same. Unused time on your current yearly period is refunded to your original payment method (proportional to remaining time). A new billing period starts now and you are charged the full monthly amount. Stripe will attempt to collect that charge immediately.
billing_upgrade_yearly_confirm_descripti: Unused time on your current monthly period is refunded to your original payment method (proportional to remaining time). A new billing period starts now and you are charged the full yearly amount. Stripe will attempt to collect that charge immediately.
business_hours_editor_error_start_before: start time must be before end time.

failed_to_mark_all_read: Failed to mark all as read
forgot_password_email: Check your inbox for the password reset link.
frequency_description: Choose how often you want to receive notifications
hours_until_reservation: There are {{hours}} hours until the reservation time.
import_customer_descr: Upload a CSV file to import customers. CSV columns: name (required), email (optional, auto-generated if not provided), phoneNumber (optional, must be unique if provided), creditPoint (defaults to 0, creates ledger entry if value provided), creditFiat (defaults to 0, creates ledger entry if value provided). All imported customers will have 'customer' role. Users are matched by email or phoneNumber if provided. If found, user is updated; if not found, new user is created with auto-generated email.
import_payment_methods_descr: Upload JSON: full exports use id; install-style files (e.g. public/install/payment_methods.json) use name only and upsert by name.
import_shipping_methods_descr: Upload JSON: full exports use id; install-style files (e.g. public/install/shipping_methods.json) use name only. Optional prices[] replaces tiers. currencyId matches case-insensitively.
in_person_credit_refill_note_ledger: Cash payment: {{cashAmount}} {{currency}}. Credit given: {{amount}} + bonus {{bonus}} = {{totalCredit}} points. Operator: {{operator}}.
in_person_credit_refill_note_with_extra: Cash payment: {{cashAmount}} {{currency}}. Credit given: {{amount}} + bonus {{bonus}} = {{totalCredit}} points. Operator: {{operator}}. {{note}}
invalid_date_format: Invalid date format. Please try again.
invalid_drop_target: Invalid drop target. Please try again.
leave_empty_to_apply_to_all_facilities: Leave empty to apply to all facilities
leave_empty_to_apply_to_all_service_staf: Leave empty to apply to all service staff
liff_phase_0_auth_hint: Link accounts via web LINE Login; riben.life stores LINE user id on User.line_userId like the main site.
line_add_friend_description: To receive notifications via LINE, please add our LINE Official Account as a friend.
line_add_friend_dialog_description: Follow these steps to add our LINE Official Account and receive notifications:
line_add_friend_note: After adding us as a friend, you'll be able to receive reservation reminders and other notifications via LINE.
line_add_friend_step_1: Open the LINE app on your mobile device
line_add_friend_step_2: Tap the "Add Friends" button or search for our Official Account
line_add_friend_step_3: Scan the QR code or search by LINE ID to add us as a friend
line_scan_qr_code: Scan this QR code with LINE to add your LINE Official Account as a friend. You can share the code with others.
magic_link_email: Please check your inbox for your login link!
rsvp_time_locked_after_confirmation: Time is locked after both store and customer confirmations.
monthly_revenue_rsvps_description: Displaying total revenue and reservation counts for {{year}}
name: Name
no_schedules_hint: Staff is available at all times. Add a schedule to restrict availability.
no_service_staff_available_at_selected_t: No service staff available at selected time
notif_msg_checkin_when_you_arrive: Check in when you arrive (scan QR or open link):
notif_msg_customer_no_show_intro: Customer did not show up for reservation:
notif_msg_payment_received_intro: Payment has been received for reservation:
notif_msg_payment_required_intro: Payment is required for your reservation:
notif_msg_please_complete_payment: Please complete payment to confirm your reservation.
notif_msg_reminder_footer:
We look forward to seeing you!

If you need to cancel or modify your reservation, please contact us.

Dear {{customerName}},

This is a reminder about your upcoming reservation.
notif_msg_reminder_staff_footer: Please be prepared for the appointment.
notif_msg_reminder_staff_intro: You have an upcoming appointment with {{customerName}}.
notif_msg_unpaid_order_anonymous_intro: Unpaid order created for anonymous customer:
notif_msg_your_reservation_confirmed_by_: Your reservation has been confirmed by the store:
notif_subject_new_reservation_request: You have a new reservation request: {{customerName}}
notif_msg_customer_confirm_required_intr: Please confirm your reservation so we can finalize your booking.
notif_msg_customer_confirm_required_foot: Use the link below (one click). If you already confirmed, you can ignore this message.
notification_center_description: View and manage all your notifications

notification_settings_descr: Configure notification channels and preferences for your store
notification_type_preferences_descriptio: Select which types of notifications you want to receive
notifications_rsvp_await_to_confirm: You have {{count}} reservation awaiting to confirm
order_ready_to_ship_descr: click to change status to in-shipping
order_sign_in_benefits: Sign in to earn points for this reservation and access your reservation information on other devices.
order_success_descr: Order created. Please wait for the store to confirm.
order_unpaid_descr: Check to confirm cash payment and order details.
otp_rate_limit_exceeded: Too many requests. Please try again in {{retryAfter}} seconds.
otp_resent_successfully: OTP code resent successfully. Please check your phone.
otp_sent_successfully: OTP code sent successfully. Please check your phone.
otp_verification_failed: OTP verification failed. Please try again.
passkeys_description: Passkey is a password-less authentication method that can be used with your device such as FaceID, TouchID, fingerprint recognition, etc. to log in to the system.
passkeys_instructions: Passkey is a password-less authentication method that can be used with your device such as FaceID, TouchID, fingerprint recognition, etc. to log in to the system.
phone_format_instruction: Enter your phone number in international format (e.g., +886912345678)
phone_number_invalid_format: Please enter a valid phone number
please_sign_in_to_make_reservation: Please sign in to make a reservation
pricing_rule_cost_descr: Leave empty to use the default cost in store settings.
pricing_rule_credit_descr: Leave empty to use the default credit in store settings.
pricing_rule_status_descr: Enable or disable this pricing rule.
priority_hint: Higher priority schedules are evaluated first
product_care_content_descr: Markdown is supported. Shown on the product page. Older entries saved as HTML still display correctly.
product_care_content_placeholder: e.g. Wipe with a dry cloth; avoid water and chemicals.
product_compare_at_price_descr: Optional list price. Shown struck through when higher than the selling price.
product_description_helper: Markdown is supported. The description appears on the product page. Older entries saved as HTML still display correctly.
product_image_empty: No images yet. Upload one to show it on the shop product page.
product_image_gallery_descr: Uploads are stored in S3. JPEG, PNG, or WebP, up to 10 MB each.
product_is_featured_descr: Display the product on the homepage
product_mgmt_add_descr: Add many products at once. One product per line; fields are separated by | (pipe).
product_mgmt_bulk_lines_invalid: Each non-empty line must include a product name and a numeric price (name|price|…).
product_mgmt_edit_descr: Edit the fields below. Save applies changes to this product.
product_mgmt_options_descr: Choices shown at checkout (e.g. size, color). Each selection line: name:price, or name:price:1 for default. Optional image URL after a fourth segment.
product_option_is_required_descr: Must fill this option when placing the order.
product_option_max_selection_descr: Customer can select up to N options.
product_option_mgmt_add_descr: allow customer to customize product's options.
product_option_min_quantity_descr: Customer need to select at least N options.
product_option_min_selection_descr: Customer need to select at least N options.
product_option_selections_descr:
Enter the selection line by line. i.e. large:10:0
small:0:1
product_option_validation_selections_req: Enter at least one selection line.
product_options_no_options_yet: No options yet. Create one or copy from a store template.
product_related_product_ids_descr: Shown first on the shop product page. Remaining slots are filled from products in the same category.
product_slug_descr: Leave empty when creating to generate from the name. Clear to use only the product ID in shop links. Must be unique per store.
product_specs_json_descr: Optional key/value JSON for the product page Details section. Leave empty to clear.
product_attribute_available_end_date_des: Optional. Last date/time this product can be purchased (shown in your local time).
product_status_descr: Only published products can be purchased
product_use_option_descr: Price will be calculated based on selected options
providers_description: Use third-party login providers to log in.
qr_code_facility_ordering_url_descr: This is the ordering URL for this facility. Typically when customers are ready, they can scan this QR code to order through this URL.
qr_code_liff_url_descr: This is the LIFF URL of the store. Customers can open the LINE mini app through this URL.
qr_code_ordering_url_descr: This is the ordering URL of the store. Customers can order through this URL.
qr_code_page_description: You can download and print the following QR Codes. If you want to design your own QR Code, please use the given URL.
qr_code_reservation_url_descr: This is the reservation URL of the store. Customers can make reservations through this URL.
qr_code_waiting_list_url_descr: This is the waiting list URL of the store. Customers can get a number through this URL.
refill_account_balance_description: Add funds to your account balance.
rsvp_customer_confirm_missing_token: This confirmation link is missing required information.
rsvp_customer_confirm_invalid: This confirmation link is invalid or has expired.
rsvp_customer_confirm_wrong_store: This link does not match this store.
rsvp_customer_confirm_success: Your reservation is confirmed. Thank you!
rsvp_customer_confirm_invalid_status: This reservation can no longer be confirmed from this link.
reservation_prepaid_required: This reservation requires prepayment. Please sign in to continue.
reset_password_success: You can now sign in with your new password!
rsvp_admin_create_reservation_descriptio: Please fill in the form below to create a reservation for the customer.
rsvp_already_no_show: Reservation is already marked as No Show
rsvp_calendar_export_hint: Add this reservation to your personal calendar.
rsvp_can_not_be_cancelled: ⚠️ This reservation is within the cannot cancel window. No refund will be provided if cancelled.
rsvp_can_only_complete_ready: Only RSVPs in Ready status can be completed
rsvp_can_only_no_show_ready: Only RSVPs in Ready status can be marked as No Show
rsvp_can_reserve_after_descr: From now, maximum hours in the future that reservations can be made. e.g. 1 year = 8760 hours; 1 month = 730 hours. Default: 3 months (2190 hours).
rsvp_can_reserve_before_descr: From now, how many hours in advanced later can reservations be made. e.g. If current time is 7PM and this is set to 2, only reservations at 9PM or later are allowed.
rsvp_can_select_service_staff_descr: Customers must select a service staff to complete the reservation.
rsvp_cancel_hours_descr: e.g. 24 hours before the reservation time can cancel for free.
rsvp_cancel_not_refundable_message: This reservation is not refundable. You will not receive a refund. Do you still want to cancel?
rsvp_cancel_reservation_confirmation: Are you sure you want to cancel this reservation? This action cannot be undone.
rsvp_cancellation_policy: To be eligible for a prepaid refund, cancel at least {{hours}} hours before the reservation start. Later cancellations are typically non-refundable.
rsvp_cancellation_policy_no_hours_thresh: No minimum advance notice for refunds by hours (prepaid refunds still follow store cancellation rules).
rsvp_cannot_cancel_reservation: This store does not allow reservations to be cancelled.
rsvp_capacity_exceeded: Capacity exceeded. Maximum capacity is {{capacity}}. Please reduce the number of people.
rsvp_checkin_scan_hint: Point the camera at the customer's check-in QR code.
rsvp_checkin_status_not_allowed: This reservation cannot be checked in at this time.
rsvp_checkin_store_mismatch: Reservation does not belong to this store.
rsvp_checkin_success_hint: Please proceed. Staff have been notified.
rsvp_delete_reservation_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this reservation?
rsvp_edit_descr: Create new reservation or edit existing reservation.
rsvp_facility_optional_description: Optional: Select a facility for this reservation
rsvp_failed_convert_rsvp_time_epoch: Failed to convert rsvpTime to epoch
rsvp_failed_convert_rsvp_time_utc: Failed to convert rsvpTime to UTC
rsvp_history_descr: Click the "Date Range" and "Reservation Status" buttons to filter reservation records.
rsvp_hours_descr: Use the settings here to determine the available reservation hours (instead of using store's business hours).
rsvp_import_auto_schedule_description: When enabled, empty lines will be automatically scheduled as recurring reservations based on previous time slots. When disabled, empty lines will be skipped.
rsvp_import_block_topup_note: RSVP import block top-up: {{amount}} {{currency}} for {{count}} reservation(s)
rsvp_import_data_description: Please paste the RSVP data in the format. First line: Customer Name, Product Name, Payment Date. Second line and beyond: Reservation date and time range.
rsvp_import_service_staff_description: Select the service staff member for all imported reservations. You can change individual reservations in the edit dialog.
rsvp_must_select_facility_descr: Customers must select a facility to complete the reservation.
rsvp_name_and_phone_required_for_anonymo: Name and phone are required for anonymous reservations
profile_update_failed: Reservation saved, but your profile could not be updated.
rsvp_name_required_for_anonymous: Name is required for anonymous reservations
rsvp_no_facilities_available_at_selected: No facilities available at selected time
rsvp_no_need_to_confirm: No Need To Confirm When Fully Paid
rsvp_no_need_to_confirm_descr: If the reservation is paid, no need to confirm the reservation.
rsvp_no_permission_to_cancel: You do not have permission to cancel this reservation
rsvp_no_permission_to_delete: You do not have permission to delete this reservation
rsvp_no_permission_to_edit: You do not have permission to edit this reservation
rsvp_no_time_slots_available_for_date: No time slots available for this date
rsvp_not_allowed_to_create: You are not allowed to create reservations
rsvp_only_pending_can_delete: Only pending reservations can be deleted. Please cancel instead.
rsvp_order_total_must_be_greater_than_ze: Order total must be greater than 0
rsvp_paid_reservation_cannot_delete: Paid reservations cannot be deleted. Please cancel instead.
rsvp_payment_method_not_found: Payment method with identifier "{{payUrl}}" not found
rsvp_period_select_start_and_end_dates: Select start and end dates for the period
rsvp_phone_required_for_anonymous: Phone number is required for anonymous reservations
rsvp_please_sign_in: Please sign in to make a reservation
rsvp_prepaid_amount: Default amount of money or points to be prepaid.
rsvp_prepaid_amount_descr: Customer need to prepay the amount of money or points to make a reservation.
rsvp_prepaid_payment_note: RSVP prepaid. Customer points used: {{points}}. Cash value: {{cashValue}} {{currency}}.
rsvp_prepaid_percentage_descr: Prepaid percentage: default is 0, meaning prepaid is not required. 100 means need to paid in full.
rsvp_prepaid_required: This reservation will deduct your prepaid points: {{points}} points.
rsvp_prepaid_required_descr: Customer must have a balance to reserve / booking requires a deposit.
rsvp_reminder_channels_use_store_notific: Reminder channels (email, LINE, SMS, etc.) are configured in Store Notification settings.
rsvp_require_signature_descr: Customer must confirm and sign off. RSVP will consider in-completed if not signed off.
rsvp_reservation_can_only_be_modified_ho: Reservation can only be modified more than {{hours}} hours before the reservation time
rsvp_reservation_not_belong_to_store: Reservation does not belong to the specified store
rsvp_reservations_can_only_be_made_hours: Reservations can only be made up to {{hours}} hours (approximately {{months}} months) in advance. The selected time is too far in the future.
rsvp_reservations_must_be_made_minutes_i: Reservations must be made at least {{minutes}} minutes in advance. The selected time is too soon.
rsvp_no_staff_available: No bookable staff are available yet. Please check back later.
rsvp_show_cost_descr: Whether to display the amount deducted or points on the reservation page.
rsvp_single_service_mode_descr: For personal shops: only ONE reservation per time slot across all facilities. When enabled, blocks any reservation if another reservation exists for the same time slot, regardless of facility. When disabled (default), multiple reservations can exist on the same time slot as long as they use different facilities.
rsvp_time_outside_business_hours_facilit: The selected time is outside business hours for this facility
rsvp_time_outside_business_hours_service: The selected time is outside business hours for this service staff
rsvp_time_outside_window: This time slot is outside the allowed reservation window
rsvp_time_slot_already_booked_facility: This time slot is already booked for this facility. Please select a different time.
rsvp_time_slot_already_booked_single_ser: This time slot is already booked. Only one reservation is allowed per time slot in single service mode.
rsvp_to_be_credited: To be Credited to Fiat Balance
rsvp_to_be_deducted: To be Deducted from Fiat Balance
rsvp_unpaid_reservation_hold_time: Unpaid reservations will only be held for 5 minutes, please pay as soon as possible.
rsvp_use_business_hours_descr: Turn on to use store's business hours. Or specify the available hours here.
rsvp_verify_phone_to_view: Verify your phone to view your reservation.
s_reservation_history_sign_in_body: Sign in to view your reservations for this store.
s_waitlist_join_card_descr: Enter party size. You will receive a verification code.
s_waitlist_save_code_descr: Save your verification code to check status or cancel.
schedule_priority_1: This setting takes precedence over store business hours.
schedule_priority_2: Select a facility and set the schedule, for this staff's working hours at the facility.
schedule_priority_3: If no schedules are configured, store business hours will be used.
search_by_name_phone_email: Enter name, phone, or email to search
select_channels_descr: Select which channels to use for delivery (only enabled channels shown)
select_file_first: Please select a file to import.
send_notification_descr: Send notifications to customers or staff
service_staff_add_descr: Add a new service staff member
service_staff_discount_descr: Discount amount applied to service staff cost when this rule matches
service_staff_id_copied: Service staff ID copied to clipboard.
service_staff_receive_store_notification: When on, this staff member receives store notifications (e.g. new reservations, RSVP updates).
set_password_description: Click the button below to receive an email to set up a password for your account.
sign_up_description: Enter your information to create an account
signin_cannot_receive_email: If you no longer able to access the mail box, please contact customer service.
signin_description: Sign in with your email and password.
signin_or_signup: Please use the following methods to sign in or sign up.
store_admin_billing_cancel_descr: Cancel or change your subscription in your billing account, or move this store to the Free plan immediately.
store_admin_billing_free_cta_descr: Upgrade to unlock Pro or Multi features for this store.
store_admin_billing_interval_descr: Switch between monthly and yearly billing for the same plan. Unused time is refunded to your payment method (proportional to remaining days), then a new period starts with a full monthly or yearly charge.
store_admin_billing_invoices_descr: Recent platform subscription charges for this store.
store_admin_billing_payment_descr: Update your payment method, view receipts, and manage your subscription in the billing portal.
store_admin_billing_plan_inactive_hint: Subscription is not active or billing needs attention. Use Manage billing or adjust your plan.
store_admin_billing_portal_error: Could not open billing portal. Try again or contact support.
store_admin_billing_subtitle: Manage your store plan, payment method, and invoice history.
store_admin_rsvp_accept_descr: When enabled, customers can book reservations through your storefront.
store_admin_rsvp_blacklist_add_descr: Search by phone, name, email, or user ID, then select the user to block.
store_admin_rsvp_cancel_hours_descr: Hours before reservation start: customers must cancel at least this many hours ahead for prepaid refunds (e.g. 24 = cancel at least 24 hours before start). Cancelling closer than this is typically non-refundable. Set 0 for no advance-hour cutoff for refunds (still requires “Customers can cancel”).
store_admin_rsvp_custom_hours_json_descr: Used when “Use store business hours” is off. Edit weekly hours, holidays, and timezone below; the same structure as store business hours is saved.
store_admin_rsvp_general_card_descr: Core toggles for accepting reservations and default booking rules.
store_admin_rsvp_min_prepaid_descr: Share of the reservation total that must be prepaid online when making the booking. 0 = no online prepayment required (no checkout step for this rule; pay at venue). 100 = full amount must be paid online before the booking is finalized. Values between require partial prepay at checkout.
store_admin_rsvp_min_prepaid_amount_desc: Minimum prepaid in your store’s currency (in addition to the percentage rule). Use 0 for no fixed floor.
store_admin_rsvp_mode_descr: Facility-first (default), staff-first, or restaurant-style booking without a specific seat.
store_admin_rsvp_max_capacity: Max guests per time slot (restaurant mode)
store_admin_rsvp_max_capacity_descr: 0 = unlimited. When set, overlapping reservations cannot exceed this total headcount (adults + children) per slot.
rsvp_fully_booked: That time is fully booked for your party size. Please choose another slot.
rsvp_staff_required: Please select a service staff member for this reservation.
store_admin_rsvp_no_need_confirm_descr: Non‑prepaid bookings start as “awaiting confirmation”; staff confirms them into “scheduled”. Once a prepaid checkout completes, the reservation moves to Ready automatically. This toggle is legacy / reserved for future behavior.
store_admin_rsvp_reminder_hours_descr: Hours before appointment time (`rsvpTime`) when we send the pre-visit reminder.
store_admin_rsvp_confirm_hours_descr: Hours after the reservation is created when we email the customer a one-click confirm link (only when status is “ready to confirm”). Minimum 1; cannot be disabled by setting 0.
store_admin_rsvp_require_signin_descr: When on, customers must be signed in to submit a reservation.
store_admin_rsvp_require_name_descr: When on, the name field is required on the booking form.
store_admin_rsvp_require_phone_descr: When on, a valid phone number is required. Signed-in customers can use the phone on their profile or enter one in the form.
store_admin_rsvp_settings_descr: Configure reservations, business hours, policies, and waitlist for your store.
store_admin_rsvp_reservation_instruction: Shown at the top of customer reservation forms when not empty. Markdown supported (headings, lists, links).
e.g. Please arrive 10 minutes before your appointment…
store_admin_rsvp_sync_google_descr: Enables store-level RSVP sync to Google Calendar. After turning this on, use Connect Google Calendar to grant Calendar access for your currently signed-in account.
store_admin_rsvp_use_store_hours_descr: When on, RSVP availability follows your store business hours from Settings.
store_admin_subscribe_already_pro_descri: This store already has Pro access.
store_admin_subscribe_confirm_failed_des: Your payment could not be verified. You can try again or contact support.
store_admin_subscribe_confirm_invalid_de: Missing subscription reference. Open Subscription from the store admin menu.
store_admin_subscribe_error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
store_admin_subscribe_intro: Subscribe to unlock Pro features for this store. You will be charged the plan amount securely via Stripe.
store_admin_switch_level_cancel_confirm: You are changing to Free version. Are you sure?
store_admin_switch_level_cancel_result: You are back to Free version. You can use paid features til: {0}.
store_admin_switch_level_page_descr: pick a version that best fits your needs.
store_admin_switch_level_title: The selected subscription plan will incur charges monthly.
store_admin_systems_card_description: Changes apply to your storefront and store admin navigation where applicable.
store_admin_systems_description: Turn core storefront features on or off: orders, reservations (RSVP), and waitlist.
store_admin_systems_order_system_descr: Enable online ordering, cart, and order management.
store_admin_systems_rsvp_descr: Enable the reservation flow and related store admin tools.
store_admin_systems_waitlist_descr: Let customers join a waitlist when slots are full (requires RSVP).
store_admin_waitlist_cancel_confirm: Cancel this waitlist entry? The guest will be removed from the queue.
store_admin_waitlist_page_descr: View the queue, call guests when their table is ready, or cancel entries still waiting.
store_admin_waitlist_settings_page_descr: Turn on the storefront waitlist and set join rules.
store_admin_waitlist_settings_queue_hint: Open the live queue for staff.
store_admin_waitlist_require_line_only_d: Guests must sign in and have Better Auth LINE OAuth linked (Account provider line). Messaging LINE ID is separate.
store_admin_waitlist_can_get_num_before_: Relative to each interval’s start in store business hours. Positive = customers may join that many minutes before opening; negative = join only that many minutes after opening. Not applied when business hours are off (wall-clock bands are used).
store_admin_waitlist_require_signin_line: Turned on automatically when LINE-only is enabled.
store_closed: Store is closed, unable to accept orders
store_notification_preferences_descr: Set default notification preferences for new customers. Customers can override these preferences in their account settings.
store_policies_page_descr: Edit markdown for legal and storefront policy pages. Each tab saves independently.
store_policies_terms_descr: Terms of service shown to customers (markdown).
store_reservation_descr: Please click + to make a reservation. It's {{required}} to prepay money or credits to complete the reservation. Free cancel is available at least {{hours}} hours ahead of the reservation time.
store_settings_accept_anonymous_order_de: customer does not need to log in to place an order.
store_settings_auto_accept_order_descr: No need to confirm orders when the setting is on.
store_settings_credit_max_purchase_descr: e.g. Can only purchase 100 points at most. 0 means unlimited.
store_settings_credit_min_purchase_descr: e.g. At least purchase 10 points. 0 means unlimited.
store_settings_google_calendar_descr: RSVP times sync to your Google Calendar when you are the assigned staff or the store owner (fallback).
store_settings_google_calendar_how_it_wo: New and updated reservations appear on the calendar you connect here. Cancelling removes the event.
store_settings_google_calendar_invalid: Your Google connection expired. Reconnect to resume sync.
store_settings_google_calendar_list_fail: Could not load your calendar list. Disconnect and connect again so Google can grant calendar list access.
store_settings_google_calendar_no_refres: Google did not return a refresh token. Remove app access in Google Account and try again.
store_settings_google_calendar_not_signe: Google Calendar is not active for this Google account yet. Open https://calendar.google.com once in your browser, then reload this page. If you use Google Workspace, ask an admin to enable Calendar.
store_settings_google_calendar_sync_cale: Choose which of your Google calendars receives new and updated reservations.
store_settings_is_open_descr: Indicates whether the store is open or closed regardless of the business hours setting.
store_settings_linepay_intro: LINE Pay channel credentials for this store.
store_settings_payout_schedule_descr: We will wire your revenue according to the settings.
store_settings_paypal_client_id_descr: REST API credentials from the PayPal Developer Dashboard. Leave blank to use platform defaults (Pro stores may override).
store_settings_paypal_client_secret_desc: Keep this secret. Leave blank to use platform defaults.
store_settings_paypal_intro: Optional per-store PayPal REST credentials. When empty, checkout uses the platform PayPal app if configured.
store_settings_policy_tab_descr: Edit store policies and legal pages on the dedicated Policies screen.
store_settings_require_prepay_descr: If on, non-paid orders is hidden to the staff.
store_settings_store_description_descr: A concise and compelling store introduction that will be displayed prominently on the homepage, allowing customers to immediately understand your store's unique value. For example: "Crafting every cup with care, bringing you the warmest moments" or "Fresh ingredients and professional service, creating unforgettable dining experiences".
store_settings_stripe_intro: Use your Stripe secret key to accept card payments.
store_settings_use_business_hours_descr: If turn off, will use [Is opened] parameter.
store_settings_use_customer_credit_descr: Turn on to enable customer credit/ points system.
store_settings_use_order_system_descr: Enable the order system for this store.
store_specific_preferences_description: Override global preferences for this store
store_subscribe_confirm_free_description: Your paid subscription will be cancelled and this store will move to the Free plan.
store_subscribe_feature_free_4: Fee only occurs when store has revenue
store_subscribe_hero_subtitle: Choose billing and a tier for this store. You can switch plans as your business grows.
store_subscribe_missing_product_config: Subscription product is not configured. Ask a system admin to set the Stripe product and prices in platform settings.
store_subscribe_prepare_failed: Could not start checkout. Please try again.
store_subscribe_yearly_estimate_notice: Shown as 12× monthly until a yearly Stripe price exists for this tier.
store_template_note: This template will be store-specific (not global)
storefront_free_shipping_minimum_descr: Order total at or above this amount qualifies for free shipping (TWD). Leave empty to disable.
storefront_gifting_content_descr: Markdown content for the gifting information page.
storefront_return_policy_descr: Markdown content for the return and exchange policy page.
storefront_shipping_eta_copy_descr: Shown on product and checkout pages when shipping is available (optional).
storefront_shipping_policy_descr: Markdown content for the order shipping and delivery policy page.
subject: Subject
subscribe_order_success_descr: You've completed the subscription. Service is ready to use as of now.
subscribe_title: Choose the plan that works for you
subscription_billing_portal_1: To update payment info, please visit:
subscription_success_descr: Subscription added. Advanced features are ready to use.
system_error_descr: unfortunately, this service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
template_description: Optional: Use a message template for consistent formatting
two_factor_card_description: Two-factor authentication is a security feature that requires two forms of identification to access your account.
two_factor_description: Please enter your one-time password to continue
two_factor_disable_instructions: Please enter your password to disable 2FA.
two_factor_enable_instructions: Please enter your password to enable 2FA.
two_factor_totp_label: EScan the QR Code with your Authenticator
users_search: Search users by name or email...
waitlist_cancel_my_wait_confirm_descript: Your queue number will be cancelled. You can take a new number if you return later.
waitlist_cannot_cancel_not_waiting: You can only cancel while still waiting. If your number was already called, please speak to staff.
waitlist_closed_now: The waitlist is closed outside business hours.
waitlist_closed_now_body: We are not taking new numbers right now (outside store hours). If you already have a number, you can still view it below when you return to this page.
waitlist_entry_ended: This waitlist entry is no longer active.
waitlist_join_failed: Could not join the waitlist. Please try again.
waitlist_line_friend_for_notifications: Add our LINE official account as a friend to receive table-ready notifications.
waitlist_not_available: Waitlist is not available for this store.
waitlist_not_enabled: Waitlist is not enabled for this store
waitlist_line_required: Please link your LINE account to join the waitlist.
waitlist_line_link_cta: This store requires a linked LINE account (OAuth) to join the waitlist. Connect LINE below, then return to this page.
waitlist_require_sign_in_when_line_only: When LINE-only is enabled, sign-in must be required.
signin_line_first_hint: This page opens LINE sign-in first. You can still use phone OTP below if you prefer.
waitlist_notify_when_ready: We'll notify you when your table is ready. Show your code to staff when your number is called.
waitlist_settings_require_name_descr: Guests must enter their name when joining the waitlist.
waitlist_show_code_to_staff: Show your code to staff when your number is called.
waitlist_sign_in_required: Please sign in to join the waitlist.
waitlist_status_called_message: Your table is ready — please come to the host stand.
waitlist_status_seated_message: You have been seated. Enjoy your meal!
waitlist_subtitle: Join the queue at {{storeName}}. We'll notify you when your table is ready.
waitlist_verification_code_failed: Could not generate verification code. Please try again.
you_are_not_allowed_to_register_this_pas: You are not allowed to register this passkey
